verdict: A mechanically sound chart with great natural foot flow, but suffers from extreme monotony in its long quarter-note streams and sudden intense tap-jump spikes.

issues.problem: Extremely long, uninterrupted quarter-note stream lasting over 30 seconds without any rest steps, which feels overly monotonous and exhausting for a Medium chart.
Intense tap-jump-tap-jump stream at 176 BPM creates a severe difficulty spike that is physically exhausting and overly complex for a Medium difficulty level.
Another rapid tap-jump-tap sequence that requires very fast foot transitions, breaking the expected pacing of a Standard/Medium chart.
